examples: Economist Carl Weinberg believes the negative effects of plunging oil prices are overwhelming the positive effects of cheaper oil.
The view of lake and plunging cliffs seduces visitors.
They sprang away, stumbling over roots and among vines in the dark, no two plunging in the same direction.
Then we crested a hill, plunging into a sea of oat grass as high as our 4x4.
Ericsson is plunging by 15% in pre-market trading after shocking investors with a major margin squeeze.
